attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
MRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
,MRBM.PRODUCT_KEY 
,MRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,MRBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
,MRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
,MRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,MRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE    
,MRBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        

,CAST(MRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT  * COALESCE ( NPFSA.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT , 1.00 ) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
,CAST(MRBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT * COALESCE ( NPFSA.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT , 1.00 ) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT
,CASE WHEN NBCF.COST_FACTOR_PCT IS NULL  THEN 0
ELSE CAST ( ( MRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * ( NBCF.COST_FACTOR_PCT ) )   * COALESCE ( NPFSA.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT , 1.00 ) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )
END  BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT

,CASE WHEN NBCF.COST_FACTOR_PCT IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE CAST ( ( ( DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT - DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT ) - BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT )   AS DECIMAL (18,6) ) 
END BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMT          

,( CAST ( ( DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT - ( FX_NET_PRICE_AMT * ( COALESCE ( NBCF.COST_FACTOR_PCT,0 ) )  ) )   AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) ) BGM_FX_COST_AMT            
,CAST ( ( COALESCE ( ( COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0 ) / NULLIF ( MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0 ) ) * DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,0 ) ) AS DECIMAL (18,6)) FX_NET_PRICE_AMT           

,CASE WHEN NBCF.COST_FACTOR_PCT IS NULL  THEN 0 
ELSE FX_NET_PRICE_AMT * ( NBCF.COST_FACTOR_PCT )
 END AS FX_BGM_AMT

,NSBE.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS INTERNAL_SBE_NAME             
,NSBE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR AS INTERNAL_SBE_DESCR            
,NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS INTERNAL_BE_NAME              
,NBE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR AS INTERNAL_BE_DESCR             
,'UNKNOWN' EXTERNAL_SBE_NAME             
,'UNKNOWN'EXTERNAL_SBE_DESCR            
,'UNKNOWN'EXTERNAL_BE_NAME              
,'UNKNOWN'EXTERNAL_BE_DESCR             
,CAST(MRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT * COALESCE ( NPFSA.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT , 1.00 ) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,CAST(MRBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY * COALESCE ( NPFSA.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT , 1.00 ) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) DD_EXTENDED_QTY
,MRBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    
,MRBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE 
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER 
/*Added below columns as part of Acquisitions Q4FY19 May Release*/   
,MRBM.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD          
,MRBM.ACQUISITION_ROLE          
,MRBM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE MRBM

INNER JOIN ( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT, FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3  ) RFM ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN NP ON MRBM.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY 

INNER JOIN (SELECT BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD,PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUM_INT 
FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_FAMILY_SBE_ALLOCATION NPFSA INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RFQ ON ( NPFSA.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 10 + NPFSA.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUM_INT) = FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
WHERE  BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD = 'I'  
 AND CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG = 'Y') NPFSA ON NPFSA.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD = 'I' AND NPFSA.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID 
/*AND ( NPFSA.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 10 + NPFSA.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUM_INT) = MRBM.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT */

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY NSBE ON NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD = 'I' AND NSBE.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME = NPFSA.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_BUSINESS_ENTITY NBE ON NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD = 'I' AND NBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME = NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NBCM ON MRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=NBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND MRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=NBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND MRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_COST_FACTOR NBCF 
ON /*NBCF.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT = RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AND */
NBCF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID 
AND NBCF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = MRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
AND NBCF.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME = NPFSA.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME

LEFT OUTER JOIN
				(
				SELECT CR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,CR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,FX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE CR,
				$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_PROFITABILITY_FX_NORM FX,
				(SELECT (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-5)*100+PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS START_DATE,       
				PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT+1 AS END_DATE
				FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE
				)PDATE
				WHERE  CR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD=FX.BK_CURRENCY_CD
				AND CR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD='USD' 
				AND CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   BETWEEN PDATE.START_DATE AND PDATE.END_DATE
				)MCR   
ON MRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND  MRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  

WHERE MRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'N'
AND MRBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN  ( 'STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED' )  
AND MRBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG  IN  ( 'Y'  )
